scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: cross-env PORT=5173 API_PORT=3001 npm run dev -w @workspace/bialto
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run --workspaces --if-present build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run --workspaces --if-present typecheck
